name: Payku
description: Chilean payment platform with APIs for cards and local methods targeting SMBs and e-commerce.

seo.title: Payku — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Payku: Chilean payment platform with APIs for cards and local methods targeting SMBs and e-commerce.

when_to_use: Accepting local payment methods for Chilean SMB e-commerce
Card payments API integration for Chilean online merchants
Embedded checkout for Chilean marketplace sellers

pros: API for cards and bank rails
review.verdict: Decent Chilean SMB option, though Transbank and Khipu dominate the market with broader integrations.
review.best_for: Chilean SMBs and early-stage e-commerce needing cards plus local bank methods
review.not_for: Merchants needing mature docs or scale beyond Chile
